message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-01",
      "title": "Thermodynamics and Energy Transformations",
      "description": "Ability to apply thermodynamic principles to analyze energy changes, predict reaction spontaneity, and understand equilibrium states in chemical systems.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply calorimetry techniques to measure enthalpy changes (∆U and ∆H)",
        "Distinguish between different types of reaction enthalpies",
        "Predict the spontaneity of reactions using Gibbs Energy Change",
        "Relate equilibrium constants to reaction quotients and Gibbs energy"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Thermodynamics",
      "chapter_name": "Thermodynamics"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-02",
      "title": "Chemical and Ionic Equilibrium Systems",
      "description": "Ability to analyze dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes, calculate equilibrium constants, and predict shifts in response to external factors.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes",
        "Apply the Law of Chemical Equilibrium to determine equilibrium constants",
        "Analyze homogeneous and heterogeneous equilibria",
        "Predict shifts in equilibrium based on concentration, temperature, and pressure changes",
        "Calculate pH and buffer capacity in ionic solutions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-03",
      "title": "Redox Processes and Electrode Dynamics",
      "description": "Ability to identify oxidation-reduction reactions, assign oxidation numbers, and understand electron transfer mechanisms in electrode processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify reactions based on classical and electron transfer definitions of redox",
        "Determine oxidation numbers for elements in compounds",
        "Analyze electrode processes in redox reactions"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-04",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry Principles and Techniques",
      "description": "Ability to understand the structural basis of organic compounds, apply nomenclature rules, analyze isomerism, and utilize purification and analysis techniques.",
      "competencies": [
        "Represent organic structures using standard conventions",
        "Apply IUPAC nomenclature rules to classify organic compounds",
        "Identify and differentiate between various types of isomers",
        "Analyze fundamental concepts in organic reaction mechanisms",
        "Execute qualitative and quantitative analysis of organic compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry – Some Basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Organic Chemistry – Some Basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-05",
      "title": "Hydrocarbon Classification and Properties",
      "description": "Ability to classify hydrocarbons, understand their structural characteristics, and evaluate their physical properties and toxicity.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify hydrocarbons into alkanes, alkenes, alkynes, and aromatic compounds",
        "Correlate structure with physical properties of hydrocarbons",
        "Evaluate the carcinogenic potential and toxicity of specific hydrocarbons"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-06",
      "title": "s & p Block Element Trends (Formative)",
      "description": "Ability to observe periodic trends in physical and chemical properties of s and p block elements, including electronic configurations and unique behaviors.",
      "competencies": [
        "Relate electronic configuration to position in the periodic table",
        "Analyze trends in atomic/ionic radii, ionization enthalpy, and hydration enthalpy",
        "Identify unique behavior of the first element in each group"
      ],
      "unit_name": "s & p Block Elements (Formative Assessment)",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-07",
      "title": "Gaseous State Behavior (Formative)",
      "description": "Ability to apply gas laws qualitatively and understand deviations from ideal behavior.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply qualitative gas laws to predict state changes",
        "Analyze the ideal gas equation and its limitations"
      ],
      "unit_name": "The Gaseous State (Formative Assessment)",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-08",
      "title": "Practical Laboratory Skills and Safety",
      "description": "Ability to perform volumetric analysis, salt analysis, and content-based experiments with precision, adhering to safety protocols.",
      "competencies": [
        "Perform volumetric analysis (titrations) accurately",
        "Conduct qualitative analysis to identify cations and anions",
        "Execute purification techniques such as crystallization",
        "Determine physical constants like melting and boiling points"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Practical Syllabus",
      "chapter_name": ""
    },
    {
      "code": "C12-CHEM-09",
      "title": "Scientific Investigation and Project Work",
      "description": "Ability to design and execute scientific investigations, collect data from multiple sources, and analyze real-world chemical phenomena.",
      "competencies": [
        "Design experiments to test hypotheses regarding water quality or chemical properties",
        "Analyze the effect of variables on chemical reactions (e.g., acidity, evaporation rate)",
        "Synthesize findings from laboratory testing and external research"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Projects",
      "chapter_name": ""
    }
  ]
}
